items.how_used: 论文列出了7条具体假设，包括道路宽度、运动员速度恒定、数据集代表性、赛道不重叠、过渡区长度、过渡区无拥堵、过渡区不在道路上，并给出了每条假设的合理性说明。
items.source_excerpt: 1. The cycling, running, and transition segments of the triathlon take place on a six-meter-wide road and the swimming course is 30 meters wide. ... 7. Transition areas are not on roads.

items.how_used: 论文使用NetLogo编写模拟程序，基于正态分布概率生成每位运动员在游泳、自行车、跑步各阶段的速度，模拟2000名运动员在赛道上的运动，以评估不同发波方案下的拥堵和道路关闭时间。
items.source_excerpt: We wrote a NetLogo program to simulate the movement of triathletes in relation to these parameters. The individual speeds of all triathletes were generated probabilistically using a normal distribution (as opposed to deterministic trials) to most accurately represent the unpredictability of open registration.

items.how_used: 论文通过调整游泳、自行车、跑步各赛段的距离，观察拥堵和道路关闭时间的变化，发现整体距离调整不敏感，但单项调整敏感，且最佳方案下增加自行车距离效果最好。
items.source_excerpt: Furthermore, we observed several interesting changes in congestion and road closure time when adjusting the race distances on the best and worst start wave schedules. ... We concluded that our model was not sensitive to overall adjustments in distance, but was sensitive to individual stage adjustments.

items.how_used: 论文中表格和图表均有编号和标题，如Table 1: Triathlon Schedule，Figure 1: Example Normal Q-Q Plot for Female Athena division，并遵循规范格式。
items.source_excerpt: Table 1: Triathlon Schedule: M=Male, F=Female, Pro=Professional, Prem=Premier, Ath=Athena, Cly=Clydesdale, U30=Under 30.

items.how_used: 论文使用Q-Q图（Quantile-Quantile plot）来检验各分组运动员速度的正态性，并附有相关性R²值（0.96）说明拟合效果。
items.source_excerpt: Figure 1 shows the data for the Female Athena division. As the points form a line with high correlation (R2 =0.96) and random deviation, we concluded that the data can be modelled by a normal distribution.

items.how_used: 论文构建了一个加权复合指标，综合拥堵程度、道路关闭时间和未完成比赛的运动员数量，用于比较不同发波方案。
items.source_excerpt: We then created a weighted composite metric to minimize individual congestion, road closure times, and the number of athletes who fail to finish the race.

items.how_used: 引言部分以信件形式向市长介绍问题背景、目标、模型方法和主要结论，结构清晰，包含问题陈述、方法概述和结果摘要。
items.source_excerpt: Dear Mayor, Thank you for your gracious support of our upcoming triathlon! ... Ultimately, we reached a solution which minimizes congestion during each stage, closes roads for less than 5.5 hours, and maximizes the number of athletes completing the race.

items.concept_label: 基于分组的波浪式发车策略
items.how_used: 论文将运动员按性别、年龄、经验水平分为18个组别，每组在不同时间出发（波浪式发车），以最小化拥堵和道路关闭时间，并测试了15种不同的发车时间表。
items.source_excerpt: We then developed and evaluated fifteen race day schedules by varying the timing and athleticism of division-based 'waves'.
